title: Multiple definition error after update to 5.014

features.name: public_flat_rw reg with conditional assign
features.description: Code should include a reg declaration with verilator public_flat_rw attribute followed by an assign statement to the same signal in a conditional branch

features.name: mix of procedural and continuous assignment with public_flat_rw
features.description: Code should include both reg declarations with public_flat_rw attribute and assign statements targeting the same signal in conditional branches
